---
title: "About"
image: "files/img/profile3.jpeg"
about: 
  template: trestles
toc: false
---

### Overview

I started my career in a **marine biogeochemistry** lab while completing a Bachelor’s in Biology from the College of Creative Studies at the University of California, Santa Barbara. There, we researched the chemical interactions between deep-sea microbes and their environment in the field and from the lab bench. <br>

After graduation, I moved on to the climate technology start-up **Symbrosia**, where I commercialized cattle methane-reducing seaweed extracts by serving as the bridge between the R&D and business development departments. Eager to build upon this experience on the economic side of environmental impact ventures, I then started with **Bhutan for Life**, a first of its kind partnership between the government of Bhutan, the World Wildlife Fund, and Green Climate fund. There I helped catalyze climate-smart initiatives in rural and indigenous communities throughout the country via strategic funding.

Now pursuing a Master’s degree at the **Bren School of Environmental Science and Management**, I am eager to build upon all these experiences to continue promoting environmental impact innovation at the intersection of markets and ecology. In my free time, I enjoy freediving and film photography.

This website is a place where you can find out more about the projects and network I built over my career. Under the "Soundings" tab, you can find extra-professional musings on topics in biology, food systems, and international development.

<p style="text-align: center;">

<a href="/files/CV_SheyDorji_TA.pdf" download
     style="
        display: inline-block;
        padding: 12px 24px;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2c3e50, #4b6584); /* Navy to slate */
        color: white;
        font-size: 16px;
        font-weight: 600;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 30px;
        text-decoration: none;
        box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        transition: all 0.3s ease;
     "
     onmouseover="this.style.transform='scale(1.05)'; this.style.boxShadow='0 6px 14px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2)'"
     onmouseout="this.style.transform='scale(1)'; this.style.boxShadow='0 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)'"> 📄 Download My CV </a>

</p>

<hr>
